comparison.note: In this 10-step / 2-batch-val probe, Cayley was faster but produced a worse validation loss.

notes: Both runs used the same seed, data pipeline, optimizer settings, scan path, and evaluation protocol; only the connection map changed.
The train-step loss at step 10 remained very close between the two runs, but the lightweight validation probe favored matrix_exp.
Because the validation probe used only 2 batches, this should be treated as an early directional signal rather than a final quality verdict.
Current evidence supports keeping Cayley opt-in while running a longer train+validation comparison.
